case_title: RIS-YARBROUGH, PATRICIA A. (GUARDIAN AD LITEM) et al VS THE SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT THE SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT
PETITION FOR MINOR BY AND THROUGH HIS GUARDIAN AD LITEM

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RIS-YARBROUGH, PATRICIA A. (GUARDIAN AD LITEM) YARBROUGH, NICOLETTE (MINOR) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT $365.00 PRINCIPAL, $52.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $417.00, DEFENDANT WAIVES DEFECT IN SERVICE AS TO THE TIME OF THE HEARING. PLAINTIFF IS 70% RESPONSIBLE FOR THE LOSS OF HER VIOLIN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,475.00 FILED BY RIS-YARBROUGH, PATRICIA A. (GUARDIAN AD LITEM) YARBROUGH, NICOLETTE (MINOR) AS TO DEFENDANT THE SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-02-2005 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
